title: Vežba 94

questions.text: Sophie zahvaljuje Jamesu na zaključku. Šta će reći?

answers.answer: That wasn't really helpful. I don't think we need to worry about anything.
answers.feedback: Sofija prihvata te izazove, pa nas neće ostaviti daleko.

answers.answer: Thanks for the insights. It sounds like we need to prepare for different scenarios.

dialogue.text: It's possible. If we get a lot of users at once, the servers could get overwhelmed. We may need to scale up to handle the load.

instructions: Slušajte zvuk i odgovorite na pitanje
explanation:
Da se zahvalite nekom na njegovom mišljenju, možete reći:

  • Thanks for the insights!

  • I appreciate your perspective.

  • That was really helpful. Thank you!

Zaključno, možete koristiti:

  • It sounds like we need to...

  • So, we should consider...

  • That means we have to prepare for...

Sophie zahvaljuje Jamesu na njegovom mišljenju i zaključuje da moraju da se pripreme za različite moguće situacije pre distribucije softvera.
